title: Gunman's Code
writer: Sherman L. Lowe, Arthur St. Claire, William Lively
actors: Kirby Grant, Fuzzy Knight, Jane Adams
plot: Wells Fargo agents Jack Douglas (Kirby Grant) and Bosco O'Toole (Fuzzy Knight) are sent after a gang of stage robbers. Danny Burton (Bernard Thomas), brother of Laura Burton (Jane Adams, is implicated before Jack is able to prove ...
